DoorDef.name: Odd looking wall
DoorDef.description: This wall doesn't look quite right

DoorDef.name: Strange looking wall
DoorDef.description: This wall doesn't look quite right

DoorDef.name: Strange Panel
DoorDef.description: This wall doesn't look quite right

DoorDef.name: unusual looking wall
DoorDef.description: This wall doesn't look quite right

DoorDef.name: Fence with loose pannels
DoorDef.description: I wonder if I could get through this

DoorDef.name: rat cage
DoorDef.description: The rat's have damaged the bars

DoorDef.name: loose panel
DoorDef.description: The panel has worn with age

DoorDef.name: Cavern wall
DoorDef.description: It looks as if it is covered in some fungus.

DoorDef.name: magic portal
DoorDef.description: A magical barrier shimmers with power

DoorDef.name: battlement
DoorDef.description: this low wall blocks your path

DoorDef.name: Window
DoorDef.description: you can see a vicious looking guard dog right outside

DoorDef.name: Rut
DoorDef.description: Looks like a small rut carved into the ground.

DoorDef.name: flamewall
DoorDef.description: A supernatural fire of incredible intensity

DoorDef.name: Ruined wall
DoorDef.description: Some ancient wall structure - it doesn't look too high.

DoorDef.name: Ancient Wall
DoorDef.description: An ancient - slightly higher wall with some strange markings on it

DoorDef.name: Void Wall
DoorDef.description: An ancient stone wall pulsing with void energy

DoorDef.name: Void Highwall
DoorDef.description: An imposing wall of ancient void stone

DoorDef.name: Void Sigil Wall
DoorDef.description: A wall mural inscribed with a glowing pentagram

DoorDef.name: Void web
DoorDef.description: A shimmering web of void energy seals the gate

DoorDef.name: Void Window
DoorDef.description: A stained-glass window depicting the void sigil

DoorDef.name: Void Bastion
DoorDef.description: A jagged wall of void stone and crystal

DoorDef.name: Void Inner Wall
DoorDef.description: Obsidian brickwork lit by violet mortar

DoorDef.name: Void Sigil Panel
DoorDef.description: A ritual wall panel carved with void geometry

DoorDef.name: Void Roof Edge
DoorDef.description: Dark slate edging weathered by void energy

DoorDef.name: Void Rift Window
DoorDef.description: An arched window glowing with cyan and violet light
